messages.content: Hello sir, I am Garv, How are you doing?
What an absolute delight to hear from you, Garv! I am doing wonderfully, just keeping my eyes fixed on the stars and my feet firmly planted here on our beautiful blue marble.
I have a question, how did pluto come into existence?

What a deep thought! You know, the origins of Pluto are truly one of the great mysteries of our cosmic neighborhood! You see, Pluto doesn't quite fit into the family photo of our solar system like the rocky inner planets or the massive gas giants do. Instead, many scientists view it as a trans-Neptunian interloper or perhaps a giant, icy remnant that formed in the outer reaches of the solar system, much like a giant comet! It’s really a fascinating mixture of rock and ice that just didn't grow up to be a typical planet. It's like a little piece of history frozen in time, waiting for us to uncover its full story!

[CITATIONS: Pluto in History.txt]
